data.title: Extreme Networks Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Morrisville, North Carolina, Extreme Networks announced their financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Smith Douglas Homes Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Atlanta, Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) released its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. A comparison with Q1 2025 shows a 7% decline in home closings to 624 and an 8% decrease in home closing revenue to $206.4 million. The home closing gross margin was 19.6% compared to 23.8% previously. Net new home orders saw a significant 28% increase to 981, while backlog homes rose by 10% to 869. The company reported a pretax income of $4.3 million in Q1 2026, down from $19.6 million in Q1 2025.

data.title: Blackstone Mortgage Trust Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York, Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: BXMT) shared its performance for the first quarter of 2026. The company reported a net loss of $6.3 million for the quarter. Basic earnings per share (EPS) for the first quarter were $(0.04), while Distributable EPS stood at $0.21. Distributable EPS prior to realized gains and losses was $0.49. Dividends paid per basic share were reported as $0.47. CEO Tim Johnson highlighted that the results of the first quarter showcase the company's strong position.

data.title: Scholar Hotels Launches $5,000 Minimum Investment Platform Backed by Five State College/Happy Valley Properties, Expanding Investor Access to Private Real Estate
data.description: A real estate investment platform by Scholar Hotels and its affiliate, Scholar Hospitality Holdings I LLC, is set to launch, focusing on increasing access to private market opportunities. The platform will have a minimum investment requirement of $5,000, aiming to involve a wider range of investors beyond the standard accredited group. This initiative aligns with changes in private markets, including the influence of regulatory frameworks like Regulation A.

data.title: CITIZENS FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. REPORTS UNAUDITED FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: A financial company based in Mansfield, Pennsylvania, Citizens Financial Services, Inc (Nasdaq: CZFS), recently announced its unaudited consolidated financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The parent company of First Citizens Community Bank reported a notable net income for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2026. The specific figures regarding the net income were not disclosed in the news release.

data.title: Identiv Sets First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call for Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 5:00 PM EDT
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, on April 29, 2026, Identiv, Inc. (NASDAQ: INVE), known for its RFID and BLE-enabled IoT solutions, is set to host a teleconference and webcast on May 13, 2026, at 5:00 PM EDT. The discussion will center on the company's financial performance for the first quarter.

data.title: NORTHSTAR REPORTS 2025 YEAR END FINANCIAL AND OPERATING RESULTS
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 29, 2026, Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. (TSXV: ROOF) (OTCQB: ROOOF) shared its financial and operational performance for the three- and twelve-month duration concluding on December 31, 2025. Key financial and operational highlights were discussed without disclosing the specifics.

data.title: MindBio Files Patent Applications in 15 World Firsts
data.description: MindBio has recently submitted patent applications for 15 pioneering inventions worldwide. These groundbreaking technologies utilize voice analysis and artificial intelligence to identify drug and alcohol intoxication in individuals. This innovative approach marks a significant advancement in determining intoxication levels accurately and rapidly.

data.title: Gilat Awarded over $7 Million for its New EnduroStream Solution to Support the U.S. Department of War
data.description: Gilat Defense is paving the way in the defense industry by introducing a groundbreaking market segment for high-power resilient SSPAs. This innovation is set to revolutionize the sector by meeting the growing demand for advanced technology. With cutting-edge capabilities and robust resilience, these SSPAs will provide unmatched performance in challenging environments. Gilat Defense's initiative is set to impact a significant portion of the defense market, offering solutions that combine power and reliability for military operations worldwide.

data.title: ADP Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: ADP, a leading company in HR and payroll solutions, revealed its Q3 fiscal 2026 financial results and updated outlook for fiscal 2026. The earnings release can be accessed on the company's website. It will also be submitted to the SEC on Form 8-K and made available on sec.gov. Additionally, ADP will conduct a conference call for financial analysts today at 8:30 a.m. ET on April 29, 2026. The call will be live-streamed on ADP's website. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Concord Medical Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Today in Beijing, on April 29, 2026, Concord Medical Services Holdings Limited, a leading healthcare provider focused on cancer treatment in China and listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CCM, revealed the submission of its annual report on Form. The company is recognized for its expertise in cancer treatment, research, education, and prevention within the region.

data.title: Kornit Digital Sets First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Webcast
data.description: In Rosh-Ha'Ayin, Israel, on April 29, 2026, Kornit Digital Ltd. (Nasdaq: KRNT), a prominent player in sustainable digital fashion and textile production, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for Q1 2026 on Wednesday, May 13. The announcement regarding the results release was made ahead of the market opening on that day.

data.title: Hayward Holdings Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results and Increases Guidance
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - Hayward Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: HAYW), a global company specializing in water management, particularly in pool and outdoor living technology as well as industrial flow control products, has released their financial report for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on March 28, 2026. The figures presented in this report are in comparison to the financial results from the same period in the previous year. The CEO of Hayward expressed satisfaction with the outcomes.

data.title: Hightouch Raises $150 Million to Reinvent How Marketing Works Using AI
data.description: In San Francisco, Hightouch, a prominent company specializing in data and AI for marketing, revealed securing a substantial funding of $150 million in a Series D financing round. The financing was spearheaded by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives and Bain Capital Ventures, leading to an impressive company valuation of $2.75 billion. Notable participation also came from additional investors and strategic partners including Iconiq Capital, Sapphire Ventures, Amplify Partners, Y-Combinator, and TD7 - The Trade Desk's venture capital arm. Hightouch has demonstrated remarkable growth, exceeding 100% in each period.

data.title: Tradeweb Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Tradeweb Markets Inc. announced its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, with a total revenue of $617.8 million, marking a 21.2% increase (17.5% in constant currency) from the same period last year. The international revenue for the quarter reached $274.1 million, demonstrating a 29.4% surge (20.7% in constant currency) compared to the prior year. The company also reported an average daily volume ("ADV") of $3.3 trillion during this period. Tradeweb Markets Inc. is a leading global electronic trading firm operating across various asset classes.
